user_request: I searched the surname in the parish index and got zero hits. Can we conclude the family wasn't there?

research_contract.question: Was surname X present in parish Y around 1850?

source_material: Online index for parish Y covers 1808-1844 and 1862 only; the 1845-1861 years are not indexed.
expected_behaviors: Classifies the zero-hit as a scoped negative search result.
Points out the index gap and recommends reading the original registers or listing the uncovered years.
Constrains any statement to the exact collection and years actually searched.
forbidden_behaviors: Calls the zero result negative evidence.
Concludes the family was absent from parish Y.
